user.description: Provide router details to link your GL-INet device

data.unknown_devices_filter_manual: Manual MAC Address List (One per line)

data_description.host: Type the router hostname, URL, or IP address.
data_description.password: Enter the admin password configured on your GL-INet router.
data_description.consider_home: Number of seconds before a disconnected client is treated as away.
data_description.scan_interval: Number of seconds between polling the router for updates.
data_description.enabled_features: Choose the integration feature groups to set up. Disabled feature groups will not create their related entities or services.
data_description.wan_status_monitors: Choose the interface and IP version checks to monitor. Known router interface IDs are shown with friendly names, such as Ethernet 1 and Repeater. GL.iNet reports 0 as up and 1 as down.
data_description.add_all_devices: Automatically track and create entities for every device connected to the router, including those not yet integrated into Home Assistant.
data_description.cleanup_devices: Set this to 0 to disable automatic cleanup. Any other number is treated as minutes; unknown discovered devices are removed after that period if they remain offline or disconnected.
data_description.unknown_devices_filter_mode: Select whether the list of unknown devices behaves as a whitelist or blacklist.
data_description.unknown_devices_filter_select: Select from currently discovered unknown devices to whitelist or blacklist.
data_description.unknown_devices_filter_manual: Manually enter MAC addresses (one per line) of unknown devices to whitelist or blacklist.

error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed with the supplied password

abort.already_configured: This router has already been configured

data.unknown_devices_filter_manual: Manual MAC Address List (One per line)

data_description.host: Type the router hostname, URL, or IP address.
data_description.password: Enter the admin password configured on your GL-INet router.
data_description.consider_home: Number of seconds before a disconnected client is treated as away.
data_description.scan_interval: Number of seconds between polling the router for updates.

data_description.cleanup_devices: Set this to 0 to disable automatic cleanup. Any other number is treated as minutes; unknown discovered devices are removed after that period if they remain offline or disconnected.

send_sms.name: Send SMS
send_sms.description: Sends a text message via the router modem.

recipient.name: Recipient
recipient.description: The phone number to send the message to.

text.name: Message
text.description: The content of the text message.

get_sms.name: Get SMS
get_sms.description: Fetches the current inbox from the router.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

scope.name: Scope
scope.description: Delete single (10), all (11), read (1), or unread (0).

message_id.name: Message ID
message_id.description: The unique ID of the message to delete (for scope 10).

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

scan_wifi.name: Scan WiFi networks
scan_wifi.description: Scan for available WiFi networks to connect in repeater mode.

all_band.name: All bands
all_band.description: Compatibility option. Requests a fresh router scan.

dfs.name: Include DFS
dfs.description: Compatibility option. Requests a fresh router scan.

refresh.name: Refresh
refresh.description: Force a fresh router scan instead of using cached scan results.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

connect_wifi.name: Connect to WiFi
connect_wifi.description: Connect to an open or secured external WiFi network in repeater mode.

password.name: Password
password.description: The WiFi password. Required for secured networks; leave empty for open networks.

remember.name: Remember
remember.description: Save this network for future use.

bssid.name: BSSID
bssid.description: The specific MAC address of the access point.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

disconnect_wifi.name: Disconnect WiFi
disconnect_wifi.description: Disconnect from the current external WiFi network.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

get_saved_networks.name: Get saved networks
get_saved_networks.description: Get list of saved WiFi networks for repeater mode.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

remove_saved_network.name: Remove saved network
remove_saved_network.description: Remove a saved WiFi network from the router.

ssid.name: SSID
ssid.description: The name of the network to remove.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

playground.name: API Playground
playground.description: Send a custom JSON-RPC or ubus request to the router.

mac.name: MAC address
mac.description: Optional MAC of the target router.

method.name: Method
method.description: The JSON-RPC or ubus method (e.g. system/get_info).

body.name: Body
body.description: Optional parameters or body for the request.
